sources_worked.notes: Full statewide active EC roster. Browser UA required (Mozilla/5.0). 3.7MB single-file download. Confirmed reliable bulk source.
Used to discover websites, founding years, owner names, and family-business signals for the top 35 candidates.
Deep-enrichment live fetches: Cappadonna, Giffen, Lyons, Zubras, Mid-West, Travis, Mather, Dausin, Bewley. Some 404s on /about routes; recovered via homepage fetch.

sources_partial.issue: Per-business Master-of-record cross-check not done at scale (would require Playwright). Owner-of-record proxy = company license holder name from bulk CSV.

sources_blocked.source: HCAD / DCAD / TCAD / BCAD / TAD / CCAD Property Search
sources_blocked.error: JS-rendered ASP.NET search; not amenable to WebFetch. Would require Playwright sub-agent.
sources_blocked.fallback_used: None — owner age remains license_tenure_proxy. This blocks A-tier promotion per skill protocol (Item 1 of a-tier-deep-dive).

sources_blocked.error: Per-business franchise-tax status not verified at scale (would require manual lookup per company). Entity_status field is null in this run.
sources_blocked.fallback_used: None — Comptroller status remains unverified. Not a hard-gate blocker (we used the publicly-active TDLR EC roster as proxy for operating status).

sources_blocked.source: TX Voter File / DMV DOB lookups

non_negotiable_compliance.a_tier_second_pass_deep_dive: PASS — 5 candidates evaluated; all demoted to B with explicit reason recorded (owner_age_proxy_only)

honest_limitations: Owner ages are 100% license_tenure_proxy (no OV65, no voter DOB, no DMV in this run). This is the single biggest blocker to A-tier promotion.

57 of 92 spine rows are 'spine_only' (no website / Wayback / team-page enrichment). Default tier for these is C_watch with confidence=low — they are verifiable real businesses (active TDLR license) but not yet ready for action.
Comptroller franchise-tax status not verified at scale; entity_status field is null.
No civil-filings / lien / disciplinary cross-checks performed on individual owners.
Successor verification done via live website fetch for 9 deep-enriched rows; mid-enriched rows fall back to web-search synthesis (lower confidence — capped at C_watch per skill protocol).
Texas voter file / DMV DOB / restricted-use sources were not invoked in this run.
